mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP and consumer credit indicate expanding aggregate demand, boosting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive SPX returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in periods of rising GDPC1 and RSAFS are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Labor market tightening below the natural rate accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, lifting equity valuations over a quarterly horizon.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below 5.0% while PAYEMS rises > 100k MoM
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are negative or flat when the trigger fires in >60% of instances, or the joint distribution of UNRATE and PAYEMS shows no predictive power for forward equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production alongside decelerating CPIAUCSL growth signals positive supply-side shocks that improve profit margins, yielding immediate positive SPX returns.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO/CPIAUCSL divergence coincides with negative SPX 5d returns in >50% of observations, or the interaction term in a regression model yields a statistically insignificant coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment (CPIAUCSL > 2.5% YoY), further increases in the federal funds rate compress equity multiples by raising the risk-free rate and signaling restrictive policy.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive despite rising rates when inflation exceeds 2.5%, or the slope coefficient of FEDFUNDS on 20d returns is positive in high-inflation subsamples.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in housing starts reflects long-term confidence in economic fundamentals and construction activity, supporting broad market returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: HOUST growth shows no predictive power for 60d SPX returns (Rank IC < 0.02), or forward returns in high-growth HOUST months are not statistically different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an impending economic slowdown or recession, prompting risk-off positioning and negative SPX returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive in >60% of instances following a 0.5pp UNRATE jump, or the signal fails to outperform a random baseline in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent acceleration in real GDP growth and nonfarm payrolls confirms a synchronized economic expansion, reinforcing earnings revisions and driving positive SPX returns over a monthly horizon.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1/PAYEMS growth divergence fails to produce positive SPX 20d returns in >55% of cases, or the interaction effect vanishes after controlling for interest rate changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is near the zero lower bound, further rate cuts or forward guidance signals aggressive monetary support, providing a floor for equity valuations and generating short-term positive SPX returns.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in >60% of instances when FEDFUNDS is below 0.5% and the trigger is active, or the signal produces no excess return over a buy-and-hold benchmark.
